anomalies.insight: Advanced Blood Test 1.2 via B2B went from 0 orders same Thursday last week to 73 on D-1 — a 5.8σ spike. There was zero volume last Thursday, confirming this is a completely new B2B account or order cycle that did not exist a week ago. B2B team should document this client and set up a recurring order follow-up.

CC_Affiliate is up 230% vs same Thursday last week (132 vs 40) and 3σ above range. A 3x week-on-week jump in the affiliate channel sustained across days confirms a new affiliate partner went live or an existing partner significantly scaled up. Affiliate team should identify the source and formalise the relationship.

Morning Cortisol is down 32% vs same Thursday last week (67 vs 98) and 8.3σ below range. The weekly comparison confirms this is a sustained decline — Cortisol was already higher last Thursday. A week-on-week drop this large in a timing-sensitive test suggests either a change in collection slot availability or a specific referring source that has stopped sending patients. Escalate to the ops and medical teams.

anomalies.key: Senior Citizen Health Checkup with Smart Report
anomalies.insight: Senior Citizen Health Checkup up 93% vs same Thursday last week (56 vs 29) and 7.3σ above range. The weekly comparison confirms this is sustained growth, not a one-day spike vs yesterday. A senior health package growing at this rate week-on-week — across App/web and B2B — suggests a new corporate wellness tie-up or insurance incentive is active. Identify the primary driver with the B2B and marketing teams.

B2B/Others up 15% week-on-week (1,858 vs 1,619) and 0.8σ above range — contributing 20% of total weekly growth. B2B growing this consistently week-on-week suggests new accounts are being added or existing accounts are increasing order frequency. The B2B team should review their top 10 accounts to understand which ones are driving the weekly acceleration.

Hyderabad up 25% week-on-week (852 vs 681) and 1σ above range — the largest absolute city weekly gain at 14% of total weekly growth. Hyderabad has been outperforming for multiple consecutive days. Investigate whether a new collection centre, phlebo capacity expansion, or a sustained Hyderabad-specific campaign is behind this and whether it can be replicated in other Tier-2 cities.

Pune up 15% week-on-week (823 vs 716) and 1.4σ above range — third consecutive day of above-range performance, now confirmed week-on-week. This is a structural Pune improvement. The ops team should document what changed in Pune over the last 7–10 days.

21:00 slot orders up 48% week-on-week (782 vs 530) and 0.6σ above range — contributing 21% of total weekly growth. Late-night bookings growing this strongly week-on-week is a consistent behavioural trend. Check if an evening notification campaign has been running for the past week and whether the late-night slot supply matches this demand growth.

13:00 slot up 12% week-on-week (630 vs 564) and 2.1σ above range. Consistent with yesterday's 13:00 signal — midday ordering is becoming a sustained pattern. Check if slot availability at 13:00 was expanded or if a recurring push notification is timed for late morning.

Magnesium via App/web down 38% week-on-week (62 vs 100) and 3.2σ below range. This is now the third consecutive data point showing Magnesium App/web weakness week-on-week. A sustained weekly decline confirms a structural issue — not day-to-day variance. Escalate to the product team to investigate App/web search ranking, featured placement, and page content for Magnesium.

Noida Upsell up 74% week-on-week (54 vs 31) and 5.5σ above range. The weekly comparison confirms Noida Upsell is not just a D-2 rebound — it was also higher than last Thursday. A Noida B2B account being cross-sold via Upsell on a recurring basis is the most likely explanation. B2B team to confirm.

anomalies.key: Senior Citizen Health Checkup with Smart Report × 1mg-App/web
anomalies.insight: Senior Citizen Health Checkup via App/web up 141% week-on-week (41 vs 17) and 4.6σ above range. App/web is driving the senior package growth sustainably week-on-week — check if an App/web featured placement or SEO improvement was made ~7 days ago and is now compounding.

anomalies.insight: Pune App/web up 19% week-on-week (501 vs 422) and 1.4σ above range. Confirms that Pune's sustained weekly growth is primarily driven by App/web, not B2B or Telesales. An App/web ranking or slot improvement in Pune is the most likely structural driver.

Delhi App/web up 20% week-on-week (701 vs 585) and 0.9σ above range — contributing 10% of total weekly growth. Delhi App/web showing consistent week-on-week strength. Check if Delhi-specific App/web campaigns, notification targeting, or improved slot coverage is driving this.

07:00 slot up 23% week-on-week (562 vs 457) and 0.9σ above range — contributing 9% of weekly growth. Morning 07:00 slot demand growing week-on-week suggests customers are booking early-morning collections more frequently. Check if new early slots were opened in high-demand cities like Delhi, Mumbai, and Hyderabad.
